title: 4th court appearance for Van Druten as bail hearing ties up
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Bevan van Druten (53),...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Bevan van Druten (53), accused of murdering his girlfriend, Nicky van Heerden (54), is due back in the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate’s Court today, 6 February, for his fourth appearance in the matter.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Bevan van Druten (53), accused of murdering his girlfriend, Nicky van Heerden (54), is due back in the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate’s Court today, 6 February, for his fourth appearance in the matter."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The court is expected to conclude the bail hearing and deliver a ruling on the State’s application for him to undergo psychiatric evaluation at Valkenberg Psychiatric Hospital in Cape Town."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Van Druten remains in custody pending the outcome of his bail application.","html":"Van Druten remains in custody pending the outcome of his bail application."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George Herald will once again apply to film the proceedings.","html":"George Herald will once again apply to film the proceedings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Follow the paper’s online platforms for updates and the latest developments from court.","html":"Follow the paper’s online platforms for updates and the latest developments from court."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: 4th court appearance for Van Druten as bail hearing ties up
